$notes: Laravel-specific prod-risk rules layered on top of @mergecore/intelligence built-ins. Each rule follows the ProdRiskRule shape — data only, no executable code.

rules.title: Model observer mutates related rows outside a transaction
rules.description: An observer method that creates/updates related models is invoked inside the parent model's save lifecycle. Without wrapping the parent write in a transaction, a failure in the observer leaves the database half-applied.
rules.fixHint: Wrap the parent write in DB::transaction(...) or move the observer logic into a queued listener that takes its own transactional boundary.

rules.title: Custom login route without a login rate-limiter
rules.description: Login-shaped routes that do not pass through Fortify or a `throttle:login,5,1` middleware are trivially brute-forceable.
rules.fixHint: Either rely on Fortify's built-in limiter, or configure a named limiter (`RateLimiter::for('login', ...)`) and apply `->middleware(['throttle:login'])`.
